title: ExplosionRemoverZ
description: A simple explosion remover so people dont explode themselves
body:
# ExplosionRemoverZ

## The Ultimate Explosion Prevention Solution for Your Minecraft Server

ExplosionRemoverZ is a high-performance, lightweight plugin designed to give server administrators complete control over all explosion types in their Minecraft world. Whether you're running a survival server where you want to prevent griefing, a creative server that needs protection from accidental TNT disasters, or a custom gamemode where certain explosion types should be disabled, ExplosionRemoverZ provides the perfect solution.

## Key Features

### 🛡️ Complete Explosion Control
* Selectively disable specific explosion types (TNT, Creepers, Withers, End Crystals, etc.)
* Option to prevent all explosions with a single configuration toggle
* Fine-grained control with separate options for block and entity damage prevention

### ⚙️ Advanced Configuration
* Highly customizable YAML configuration file
* Toggle between complete event cancellation or just preventing explosion damage
* Entity-specific control allowing you to maintain game balance while preventing grief

### 🚨 Admin Notifications
* Real-time alerts when explosions are prevented
* Configurable notification messages with placeholders
* Choose which staff members receive alerts
* Console logging options for server monitoring

### 🔧 Simple Administration
* Easy-to-use commands with tab completion
* Reload configuration without server restart
* Permission-based access control
* Detailed help documentation

### 🚀 Performance Optimized
* Lightweight event handling with minimal resource usage
* No database dependencies or complex setups
* Works seamlessly with other plugins
* Compatible with all major Minecraft versions (1.16+)

### 🎮 Enhanced User Experience
* Optional sound effects when explosions are prevented
* Configurable particle effects for visual feedback
* Maintains vanilla gameplay feel while providing protection

## Why Choose ExplosionRemoverZ?

### For Server Owners
ExplosionRemoverZ eliminates one of the most common sources of player complaints and administrative headaches: griefing through explosions. By providing granular control over exactly which explosions are allowed and under what circumstances, you can create a more secure and enjoyable environment for your community without sacrificing gameplay elements that make Minecraft fun.

### For Players
No more lost builds due to creeper attacks or TNT griefing! ExplosionRemoverZ ensures that player creations remain intact while maintaining the challenge and excitement of Minecraft's combat and exploration systems.

### For Developers
The clean, well-documented code makes ExplosionRemoverZ easy to extend or integrate with other server systems. The event-based architecture ensures compatibility with the broader plugin ecosystem.

## Getting Started

Installation is simple! Just drop the ExplosionRemoverZ.jar file into your plugins folder and restart your server. The default configuration will immediately protect your server from the most common explosion types, and you can customize settings further through the generated config.yml file.

Basic commands:
- `/erz reload` - Reload the configuration
- `/erz info` - Display plugin information
- `/erz help` - Show command help

## The Technical Edge

Unlike other explosion prevention plugins that use resource-intensive methods like tracking and rolling back changes, ExplosionRemoverZ uses Bukkit's efficient event system to prevent unwanted explosions before they occur, resulting in:

- Zero performance impact during normal gameplay
- No lag spikes during explosion prevention
- Minimal memory footprint
- Superior compatibility with other gameplay systems

Make your Minecraft server safer and more enjoyable today with ExplosionRemoverZ - where protection meets performance!
